name: atlasmind
description: AtlasMind - AI-powered knowledge base management with Confluence integration and Ollama LLM backend

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @atlasmind/contracts && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @atlasmind/contracts && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @atlasmind/contracts && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
